subject: WM-0116 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Prior compact-menu issue is resolved: independent Web audit at 390x720 and 800x720 in en-US and zh-TW kept main-menu-panel within 16..704 vertical bounds, zero horizontal overflow, and language buttons plus Settings locale selector reachable before dismissal. Required gates passed: typecheck, web-shell e2e (6 tests), desktop-shell e2e (3 tests), validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.
